import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'; import { useParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useReactToPrint } from 'react-to-print'; import Layout from '../components/layout/Layout'; import api from '../services/api'; import { formatCurrency, formatDate, numberToWords } from '../utils/helpers'; /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── INVOICE PRINT COMPONENT Font-size 9pt throughout. Columns use fixed px widths to prevent overlap. ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const InvoicePrint = React.forwardRef(({ invoice, settings }, ref) => { const s = settings || {}; const intra = invoice.supplyType !== 'inter'; const isGST = invoice.billingType === 'gst'; const cell = (extra = {}) => ({ border: '1px solid #000', padding: '3px 4px', fontSize: 9, fontFamily: 'Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif', verticalAlign: 'top', lineHeight: 1.35, overflow: 'hidden', wordBreak: 'break-word', ...extra, }); const hCell = (extra = {}) => cell({ background: '#e8e8e8', fontWeight: 'bold', textAlign: 'center', verticalAlign: 'middle', ...extra, }); /* * Pixel widths — A4 usable ~760px. * intra 12 cols: SNo|Desc|HSN|Qty|UOM|Rate|Taxable|CGSTr|CGSTa|SGSTr|SGSTa|Total * inter 10 cols: SNo|Desc|HSN|Qty|UOM|Rate|Taxable|IGSTr|IGSTa|Total * plain 8 cols: SNo|Desc|HSN|Qty|UOM|Rate|Taxable|Total */ const cols = isGST ? (intra ? [22, 165, 56, 28, 30, 52, 72, 40, 52, 40, 52, 60] : [24, 205, 58, 30, 32, 58, 76, 42, 58, 66]) : [28, 300, 64, 36, 36, 72, 104, 106]; return (
{/* ── SHOP HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
TAX INVOICE
{s.shopName}
{[s.shopAddress, s.shopCity, s.shopState, s.shopPincode].filter(Boolean).join(', ')}
{s.shopPhone &&
PHONE: {s.shopPhone}
} {s.shopGstin &&
Gstin Number: {s.shopGstin}
}
FORMERLY SWARAJ MAZDA — AUTHORISED SERVICE CENTER & DISTRIBUTORS & DEALERS OF SPARE PARTS
{[ ['Invoice No', invoice.invoiceNumber, true ], ['Invoice Date', formatDate(invoice.invoiceDate), false], ['Place of Supply', invoice.placeOfSupply || 'CHANDIGARH', false], invoice.vehicleModel ? ['Model', invoice.vehicleModel, false] : null, invoice.vehicleNumber ? ['Veh. No', invoice.vehicleNumber, false] : null, ['Transport', 'BY HAND', false], ['Payment', (invoice.paymentStatus || '').toUpperCase(), true ], ].filter(Boolean).map(([label, val, bold], i) => ( ))}
{label} : {val}
{s.bankName && (
BANK NAME : {s.bankName}
{s.bankAccount &&
A/C NO : {s.bankAccount}
} {s.bankIfsc &&
IFSC : {s.bankIfsc}
}
)}
{/* ── BILLED TO / SHIP TO ─────────────────────────────────── */} {['Details of Receiver (Billed to)', 'Details of Receiver (Ship to)'].map((label, ci) => ( ))}
{label}
Name : {invoice.customerName}
{invoice.customerAddress &&
Address : {invoice.customerAddress}
} {invoice.customerGstin &&
GSTIN : {invoice.customerGstin}
} {invoice.customerStateCode &&
State Code : {invoice.customerStateCode}
} {invoice.customerMobile &&
Phone : {invoice.customerMobile}
}
{/* ── ITEMS TABLE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */} {cols.map((w, i) => )} {isGST && intra && <> } {isGST && !intra && <> } {invoice.items.map((item, i) => ( {isGST && intra && <> } {isGST && !intra && <> } ))} {Array.from({ length: Math.max(0, 4 - invoice.items.length) }).map((_, i) => ( ))}
S.No Description & Part No HSN/SAC Qty UOM Rate Taxable Value
CGST
Rate
CGST
Amt

Rate

{i + 1}
{item.productName}
{item.brandName && item.brandName !== item.productName && (
{item.brandName}
)} {item.partNumber && (
PN: {item.partNumber}
)} 		{item.hsnCode} {item.quantity} {item.unit} {(+item.rate).toFixed(2)} {(+item.taxableValue).toFixed(2)}{(+item.cgstPercent).toFixed(2)}% {(+item.cgstAmount).toFixed(2)} {(+item.sgstPercent).toFixed(2)}% {(+item.sgstAmount).toFixed(2)}{(+item.igstPercent).toFixed(2)}% {(+item.igstAmount).toFixed(2)}{(+item.totalAmount).toFixed(2)}
 
{/* ── TOTALS ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
Invoice Value (In Words)
Rs. {numberToWords(Math.round(invoice.grandTotal || 0))}
{isGST && (
{intra ? <> : ( )}
Sale @{invoice.items[0]?.gstPercent || 18}% {(+(invoice.taxableAmount || 0)).toFixed(2)}
CGST @{invoice.items[0]?.cgstPercent || 9}% {(+(invoice.totalCgst || 0)).toFixed(2)}
UTGST @{invoice.items[0]?.sgstPercent || 9}% {(+(invoice.totalSgst || 0)).toFixed(2)}
IGST @{invoice.items[0]?.igstPercent || 18}% {(+(invoice.totalIgst || 0)).toFixed(2)}
)} {invoice.notes && (
REMARKS: {invoice.notes}
)} 		{[ { label: 'Total', val: (+(invoice.taxableAmount || 0)).toFixed(2) }, isGST && intra ? { label: 'CGST Amount', val: (+(invoice.totalCgst || 0)).toFixed(2) } : null, isGST && intra ? { label: 'UTGST Amount', val: (+(invoice.totalSgst || 0)).toFixed(2) } : null, isGST && !intra ? { label: 'IGST Amount', val: (+(invoice.totalIgst || 0)).toFixed(2) } : null, isGST ? { label: 'GST Amount', val: (+(invoice.totalGst || 0)).toFixed(2) } : null, { label: 'FREIGHT', val: '0.00' }, { label: 'FREIGHT ON GST', val: '0.00' }, ].filter(Boolean).map((row, i) => ( ))} {(invoice.dueAmount || 0) > 0 && ( )}
{row.label} {row.val}
Invoice Total Rs. {(+(invoice.grandTotal || 0)).toFixed(2)}
Paid Amount {(+(invoice.paidAmount || 0)).toFixed(2)}
Balance Due {(+(invoice.dueAmount || 0)).toFixed(2)}
{/* ── TERMS + SIGNATURE ───────────────────────────────────── */}
TERM & CONDITION OF SALE
{s.termsAndConditions || 'Interest @20% p.a. will be charged on all outstanding bills. Our responsibility ceases as soon as goods are handed over to the carrier / Railway. In case of any dispute or difference, Chandigarh courts alone will have jurisdiction.'}
Certified that the Particulars given above are true and correct
For {s.shopName}
Authorised Signatory
{/* ── PACKED / DISPATCHED / PREPARED ─────────────────────── */} {['Packed By', 'Dispatched By', 'Prepared By'].map((label, i) => ( ))}
0 ? 'none' : undefined })}>
{label}
{label === 'Dispatched By' ? 'BY HAND' : '______________________'}
Original For Consignee  |  Computer Generated Invoice
); }); /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── PAGE COMPONENT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ export default function InvoiceDetail() { const { id } = useParams(); const printRef = useRef(); const [invoice, setInvoice] = useState(null); const [settings, setSettings] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [showPayModal, setShowPayModal] = useState(false); const [payForm, setPayForm] = useState({ amount: '', method: 'cash', reference: '', note: '' }); const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([api.get(`/invoices/${id}`), api.get('/settings')]) .then(([inv, set]) => { setInvoice(inv.data.data); setSettings(set.data.data); }) .catch(() => {}) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, [id]); const handlePrint = useReactToPrint({ content: () => printRef.current, documentTitle: invoice ? 'Invoice-' + invoice.invoiceNumber : 'Invoice', pageStyle: ` @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 6mm; } @media print { * { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important; print-color-adjust: exact !important; } body { margin: 0; padding: 0; } } `, }); const handlePayment = async () => { if (!payForm.amount) return; setSaving(true); try { await api.post('/invoices/' + id + '/payment', { ...payForm, amount: Number(payForm.amount) }); const res = await api.get('/invoices/' + id); setInvoice(res.data.data); setShowPayModal(false); setPayForm({ amount: '', method: 'cash', reference: '', note: '' }); } finally { setSaving(false); } }; if (loading) return
; if (!invoice) return
Invoice not found.
; const statusBadge = { paid: 'success', partial: 'warning', pending: 'danger', credit: 'info' }; return ( {/* Action bar */}
← Back {invoice.dueAmount > 0 && ( )} {(invoice.paymentStatus || '').toUpperCase()} {invoice.dueAmount > 0 && ( Due: {formatCurrency(invoice.dueAmount)} )} {invoice.paidAmount > 0 && ( Paid: {formatCurrency(invoice.paidAmount)} )}
{/* Preview card */}
Invoice Preview — {invoice.invoiceNumber} {formatDate(invoice.invoiceDate)}  —  {invoice.customerName}
{/* Payment history */} {invoice.payments?.length > 0 && (
Payment History
{invoice.payments.map((p, i) => ( ))}
# Date Method Reference Amount Note
{i + 1} {formatDate(p.date)} {p.method} {p.reference || '—'} {formatCurrency(p.amount)} {p.note || '—'}
)} {/* Payment modal */} {showPayModal && (
setShowPayModal(false)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>
Record Payment
Due: {formatCurrency(invoice.dueAmount)}
setPayForm((f) => ({ ...f, amount: e.target.value }))} placeholder={invoice.dueAmount} autoFocus />
setPayForm((f) => ({ ...f, reference: e.target.value }))} placeholder="UPI ref, cheque no..." />
setPayForm((f) => ({ ...f, note: e.target.value }))} />
)} ); }
